title: Lotus Flower Incense Holder Metal Burner for Stick, Cone and Coil Incense, Zinc Alloy Lotus Flower Design with Bronze Finish, Detachable Ash Catcher, Ideal for Home, Office, Yoga and Meditation Spaces
features: This lotus flower incense holder provides a simple way to create a calmer and more welcoming atmosphere at home. Its layered flower design helps incense sticks stay upright and stable while the wide base catches ash effectively, making it easy to enjoy your favourite scents during quiet moments, meditation, or daily winding-down routines

Measuring approximately 8.5 cm in diameter and around 1.3 cm in height, this holder is compact enough to fit on small tables, shelves, desks, or bedside surfaces without taking up unnecessary space. The zinc alloy build gives it a reassuring weight and a detailed bronze finish that looks attractive when displayed with other decor.

The multi-hole centre section allows you to use different types of stick incense, making it suitable for a range of scents and thicknesses. The detachable piece can be removed when you prefer cone or coil incense, giving you more flexibility in how you enjoy fragrance throughout your home.

Its durable metal structure makes it easy to maintain, as cooled ash can be cleared away quickly and the surface can be wiped clean without fuss. This makes it convenient for people who use incense regularly and want something reliable that will last through repeated use.

With its detailed lotus design and warm metallic tones, this holder can serve as both a functional incense burner and an attractive decorative piece. It works well in living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, offices, yoga spaces, or anywhere you want to introduce a touch of calm, helping your environment feel more peaceful and intentional.
description: This lotus incense holder is designed to bring a calmer feel to your space while offering a practical way to burn incense without mess. Made from zinc alloy with a warm bronze finish, it has a layered lotus shape that adds interest to a room even when not in use. Measuring roughly 8.5 cm across and about 1.3 cm high, it sits neatly on desks, shelves, tables or bedside areas without taking up much room. The central multi-hole section supports different types of stick incense, and the removable piece lets you switch to cone or coil incense when preferred. Its solid metal build makes it easy to keep clean, with ash collecting neatly in the base. Whether used in a living room, bedroom, office, yoga space or meditation corner, it offers a simple way to enjoy scent while adding a decorative touch to your home.
